items.title_original: Why Local LLMs Suddenly Slow Down at Long Context
items.title_neutral: Why Local LLMs Suddenly Slow Down at Long Context
items.excerpt: Your local LLM runs fine until the context fills up past a certain point - then generation speed can drop by ~50%. The cause is the KV cache spilling out of VRAM into slower shared memory. On Windows it happens silently, with no out-of-memory error to warn you.
items.recap_neutral: Your local LLM runs fine until the context fills up past a certain point - then generation speed can drop by ~50%
items.main_idea: Why Local LLMs Suddenly Slow Down at Long Context
